raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Senate Bill 403 will target and racially profile South Asian Californians.",
    "Senate Bill 403 will put California residents and businesses at risk and jeopardize the state's innovative edge.",
    "No concrete evidence or data has been provided to show extensive caste discrimination in California.",
    "The survey by Equality Labs has been deemed unscientific.",
    "The only legal case of caste discrimination in California was dismissed by the Santa Clara Superior County Court.",
    "Senate Bill 403's definition of 'perceived position' in a system of social stratification is vague.",
    "The vagueness of Senate Bill 403 will subject businesses to baseless charges of discrimination.",
    "Workers can claim discrimination based on hair color, ancestry, or marital status under the broad definition in Senate Bill 403.",
    "Adding the term 'caste' to the definition of 'ancestry' will introduce the first explicitly racially discriminatory term to California law.",
    "Senate Bill 403 proceeds on the presumption that South Asians are inherently bigoted.",
    "Employers may be wary of hiring South Asians due to the implications of Senate Bill 403."
  ]
}
```
